name: Shrimp Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Bouillon Granules, Water, White Wine, Lemon slices, Onion slices, Garlic, Bay Leaves, and Red Pepper Flakes in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Add Shrimp and cook for 3 to 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp from the broth using a slotted spoon; set aside, reserving the broth.
3. Rinse the cooked shrimp under cold water, then peel and devein them. Set aside.
4. Strain the broth mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into another bowl, reserving half of the liquid and garlic cloves. Discard the lemon slices, onion pieces, and bay leaves.
5. Add the reserved liquid and garlic to the bowl with the oil, vinegar, and mustard. Blend until smooth.
6. Cook the pasta according to package directions. Drain thoroughly and rinse under cold water; drain again.
7. In a large serving bowl, combine the cooked pasta, red bell pepper, peas, basil, purple onion, parsley, and red pepper. Add the reserved broth mixture and toss well to coat.
8. Gently fold in the reserved shrimp. Cover the bowl and chill thoroughly before serving.
(Fat 11. Chol. 38.)
